_readme: FROM-SCRATCH REDISCOVERY league (M3 exit criterion: 'exploiter rediscovers the corruption→Fallen PvP line without gates'). One main lane starting from a MINTED RANDOM net (laneInit 'random' → ml/random_init_v1.py, deterministic via seedBase), against the 8 heuristic anchors ONLY — seedCheckpointAnchors:false strips every corruption-knowing checkpoint from the roster, so nothing in the league can teach the line. mode ppo works from gen 1 because the random net is policy-driven (real logpOld) — no heuristic-bootstrap BC rows anywhere. USAGE: mkdir -p ml/league_rediscovery && cp ml/league/configs/rediscovery.json ml/league_rediscovery/config.json && node scripts/run-league.mjs init --root ml/league_rediscovery && node scripts/run-league.mjs run --root ml/league_rediscovery --gens 20. METRICS (per gen): ml/.venv/bin/python ml/dashboard.py league --league-dir ml/league_rediscovery — read the corruption table (finalStatus==3 share) and winnerCorruptPct trajectories; SUCCESS = the learner's corruption rate climbs from ~random toward the Fallen line and its eval/gauntlet strength follows, with no gate, teacher, or warm start. Gauntlet promotion (every promoteEvery gens) still scores vs the frozen anchor pool — that is a benchmark, not an opponent.
